item.title: GK Energy Ltd Reports Positive Quarterly Growth Amid Margin Pressures
item.description: GK Energy Ltd, a small-cap player in the Compressors, Pumps & Diesel Engines sector, has posted a positive financial performance for the quarter ended March 2026, signalling a shift from a very positive to a positive financial trend. Despite robust revenue growth and profit gains, the company faces rising interest costs that have tempered margin expansion. Time: 57 minutes ago

item.title: Ratnaveer Precision Engineering Ltd Reports Flat Quarterly Performance Amid Rising Interest Costs
item.description: Ratnaveer Precision Engineering Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Iron & Steel Products sector, has reported a flat financial performance for the quarter ended March 2026, signalling a shift from its previously positive growth trajectory. Despite recording its highest quarterly profit after tax (PAT) at ₹17.03 crores, the company faces mounting challenges from rising interest expenses and contracting profitability margins, prompting a reassessment of its financial health and market positioning. Time: 57 minutes ago

item.title: Sensex and Nifty Edge Higher as Metal Sector Leads Gains; Mixed Performance Across Market Segments
item.description: Indian equity benchmarks closed marginally higher on 13 May 2026, with the Sensex gaining 49.74 points (0.07%) to settle at 74,608.98 and the Nifty rising 33.05 points (0.14%) to 23,412.60. The market was buoyed by strong sectoral performances, particularly in metals, while IT stocks faced pressure. Market breadth remained positive, supported by mid and small caps, amid mixed foreign institutional investor (FII) and domestic institutional investor (DII) activity. Global cues were cautiously optimistic, reflecting ongoing geopolitical and economic developments. Time: 57 minutes ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Edges Higher Amid Mixed Sectoral Trends and Technical Upgrades
item.description: The BSE Smallcap 250 index recorded a modest gain of 0.27% on 13 May 2026, continuing its position as the best-performing market capitalisation segment amid a mixed performance across individual stocks and sectors. Market breadth improved with a healthy advance-decline ratio, signalling underlying strength despite pockets of weakness in select names. Time: 57 minutes ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Sees Mixed Performance with Dixon Technology Leading Gains
item.description: The large-cap segment demonstrated a modest overall gain, buoyed by standout performers such as Dixon Technology, which delivered a robust 9.73% return. However, the segment also faced headwinds with Tata Power Co. registering a decline of 3.36%, reflecting a mixed market environment as investors weigh defensive and cyclical sector dynamics. Time: 57 minutes ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Advances 0.71% Led by SAIL’s Strong Gains; Mixed Sectoral Performance
item.description: The BSE Midcap 150 index advanced by 0.71% on 13 May 2026, marking the mid-cap segment as the best performing category in the broader market. This upward momentum was driven by standout performers such as Steel Authority of India Limited (SAIL), which delivered a robust return of 14.55%, while the segment also witnessed some pressure from laggards like Torrent Power, which declined by 8.73%. The breadth of the market remained positive with a 1.6x advance-decline ratio, signalling broad-based participation among mid-cap stocks. Time: 57 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Macfos Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 1084
item.description: Surging past its previous peak, Macfos Ltd touched a new 52-week high of Rs 1084 on 13 Jun 2026, propelled by a confluence of bullish technical indicators and robust price momentum that outpaced its sector and the broader market. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts NINtec Systems Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 585
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 585 on 13 Jun 2026, NINtec Systems Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, marking a 25.84% gain over the past year and significantly outperforming the Sensex, which declined 8.06% over the same period. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Biogen Pharmachem Industries Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 0.42 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: A sharp decline has pushed Biogen Pharmachem Industries Ltd to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 0.42 on 13 May 2026, marking a significant 61% drop from its peak of Rs 1.08 within the last year. This downturn comes despite some improvement in profitability, highlighting a complex interplay of valuation and market sentiment pressures. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Welspun Investments & Commercials Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 1712
item.description: From a 52-week low of Rs 792.15 to a fresh peak of Rs 1712, Welspun Investments & Commercials Ltd has more than doubled in value over the past year, showcasing a remarkable 111.36% rally that outpaces the Sensex’s decline of 8.06% over the same period. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Meesho Ltd Surges 6.01% to Day's High of Rs 192.5 — Outperforms Sector by 5.21 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex inched up 0.09% after a volatile session, but Meesho Ltd outperformed sharply with a 6.01% gain, touching an intraday high of Rs 192.5. This 5.21 percentage-point outperformance over its E-Retail/ E-Commerce sector peers signals a distinctly stock-specific move rather than a broad market lift. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Archean Chemical Industries Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Archean Chemical Industries Ltd experienced a notable decline today, hitting an intraday low of Rs 559, reflecting a 6.35% drop as the stock underperformed its sector and broader market indices amid persistent selling pressure. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Sasken Technologies Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Sasken Technologies Ltd experienced a notable intraday decline on 13 May 2026, touching a low of Rs 1711, marking a 7.11% drop from previous levels. This downturn reflects immediate price pressures despite the broader market’s modest recovery, with the stock underperforming its sector and the Sensex index. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Welspun Investments & Commercials Ltd Hits All-Time High of Rs 1,712 as Momentum Builds Across Timeframes
item.description: Welspun Investments & Commercials Ltd, a key player in the Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC) sector, reached a significant milestone on 13 May 2026 by touching its all-time high stock price of Rs 1,712. This achievement marks a remarkable journey for the micro-cap company, reflecting a strong performance trajectory over multiple time frames despite a challenging broader market environment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Magnus Steel Leads Micro Cap Rally with Over 1000% Return in Six Months
item.description: Magnus Steel has delivered an extraordinary return of 1041.02% over the past six months, outpacing all other micro cap stocks and significantly outperforming broader market benchmarks. This remarkable surge highlights the stock’s strong technical and financial fundamentals, despite its expensive valuation, positioning it as a standout performer in the Other Electrical Equipment sector. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Exceptional Returns from Top Small and Micro Cap Stocks in One Year
item.description: In a remarkable display of market outperformance, several small and micro cap stocks have delivered extraordinary returns over the past year, significantly outpacing benchmark indices and sector peers. These stocks, spanning sectors such as FMCG, Specialty Chemicals, Non-Ferrous Metals, and Aerospace & Defense, have been propelled by strong fundamentals, bullish technicals, and favourable valuations, rewarding investors with gains ranging from over 300% to more than 600%. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: ICICI Prudential Asset Management Co Ltd Rallies 3.13% and Approaches 20 DMA Resistance — A Key Technical Test Ahead
item.description: The Sensex inched up 0.11% after a volatile session, but ICICI Prudential Asset Management Co Ltd surged 3.13%, outperforming its sector by 2.11 percentage points. This sharp single-session gain stands out as a stock-specific event amid a broadly cautious market environment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Kalpataru Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 13 May 2026
item.description: Kalpataru Ltd experienced a significant intraday decline on 13 Jun 2026, touching a low of Rs 342.3, reflecting a sharp price pressure of -9.8% during the trading session. The stock underperformed its sector and broader market indices, continuing a three-day losing streak amid heightened volatility and mixed technical signals. Time: 1 hour ago
